section_law_quote: If designing onboarding, auth, or checkout flows → mobbin.com first — these flows have established UX conventions that must be respected.
synthesis_principle_extracted: Auth screens converge on a single centered card with one primary action, the brand mark on top, and minimal chrome (mobbin). Our brand is premium/airy, so use generous whitespace and a single accent color for the action (minimal.gallery). Synthesis: keep the familiar centered-card login hierarchy (logo → headline → one primary CTA → secondary create-account link → escape hatch back to store), but because auth is delegated to Souped OAuth, collapse the email/password form into one trusted 'Sign in' action wrapped in our soft-mesh brand with lime as the sole action color — a real account-login page without owning a credential form. Concrete user reference: Hawaiian Host /account/login.
